name: super-sean-007-jrpg
description: Production-ready website and playable HTML5 JRPG for Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems.

scripts.dev: npm run sync:site && npm run generate:audio && npm run slice:heroes && npm run build:tilesets && npm run slice:assets && npm run slice:mobs && npm run slice:objects && npm run slice:icons && npm run slice:vfx && npm run slice:ui && npm run split:backgrounds && vite --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.build: npm test && npm run generate:assets && npm run clean:dist && vite build && node scripts/build-static.mjs && node scripts/sync-site-facts.mjs --dist && npm run validate && node scripts/validate-hardening.mjs && npm run budget:performance
scripts.generate:assets: npm run generate:audio && npm run slice:heroes && npm run build:tilesets && npm run slice:assets && npm run slice:mobs && npm run slice:objects && npm run slice:icons && npm run slice:vfx && npm run slice:ui && npm run split:backgrounds && npm run brand:assets && npm run optimize:images
